thinking.thinking: Let me start by loading the context for the ponder 'agent-activity-display-improvements' and also check existing milestones and features to understand the current state.

Now I have a complete picture of the ponder. Let me analyze:

**The Ponder:** `agent-activity-display-improvements`
- Three targeted UI improvements to the agent activity feed
- Well-scoped, clear implementation plan
- All frontend changes only (no Rust, no API changes)
- Six files affected, two new components

**Scope Assessment:** This is a single-concern feature set (all about the RunActivityFeed display). The design is already done. It's a small/medium idea that fits into a single milestone.

**Looking at existing milestones:**
- `v09-run-activity-feed` — released, this is the original feed milestone


- `v15-agent-observability` — released, agent activity/quota/time-series

None of the active milestones cover agent activity display improvements directly. This is clean, focused frontend work that warrants its own small milestone. Looking at the latest numbered milestone `v30-ponder-merge`, I'll use `v31` for this. Since all three improvements target the same feed UI and could ship together, I'll structure this as one milestone with a single feature.

Creating `v31-activity-feed-polish` to handle subagent cards with proper input/output pairing, markdown rendering across all feed cards, and a column layout for the init header. The subagent pairing logic and CompactMarkdown component are the main implementation pieces, with the init card layout being a straightforward restructuring.

text:
Good, I have the full picture. Three independent UI improvements to the agent activity feed, all frontend-only. Let me size and create the milestone.

**Sizing:** Single concern (RunActivityFeed display), well-scoped design, no API or Rust changes. → One new milestone, 3 parallel features (one per improvement).

input.command:
sdlc milestone create v31-activity-feed-polish \
  --title "Activity Feed Polish — subagent cards, markdown rendering, init header column" \
  --vision "Developers can see what subagents did and read formatted markdown in the activity feed" 2>&1

sdlc milestone create v31-activity-feed-polish \
  --title "Activity Feed Polish — subagent cards, markdown rendering, init header column" 2>&1

sdlc feature create activity-subagent-cards --title "Subagent input/output cards in activity feed" 2>&1 && \
sdlc feature create activity-compact-markdown --title "CompactMarkdown component — markdown rendering across all activity feed cards" 2>&1 && \
sdlc feature create activity-run-init-column --title "RunInitCard header: row layout → column layout" 2>&1

sdlc milestone add-feature v31-activity-feed-polish activity-subagent-cards 2>&1 && \
sdlc milestone add-feature v31-activity-feed-polish activity-compact-markdown 2>&1 && \
sdlc milestone add-feature v31-activity-feed-polish activity-run-init-column 2>&1
input.description: Link all features to the milestone

text:
Done. Here's the summary:

---

## Created

**Milestone:** `v31-activity-feed-polish`
> Activity Feed Polish — subagent cards, markdown rendering, init header column

**Features (all 3 linked):**

| Feature | Scope |
|---|---|
| `activity-subagent-cards` | `PairedSubagentBlock` type + `pairEvents.ts` pairing logic + `SubagentCard.tsx` (violet border, collapsible input, visible output) + `RunActivityFeed.tsx` render case |
| `activity-compact-markdown` | `CompactMarkdown.tsx` component + apply to `AssistantTextBlock`, `RunResultCard`, `RunInitCard`, `ToolCallCard` |
| `activity-run-init-column` | `RunInitCard` layout: single `flex-row` → `space-y-1` column with indented metadata rows |

All three are independent — can run in parallel. No Rust or API changes required.

**Next:**
```
/sdlc-prepare v31-activity-feed-polish
```
